channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Blocked drain or damaged drain, 2nd June
item.description:
There is a blocked or damaged drain that keeps making a huge puddle outside of the cafe. We have reported this issue 2 or 3 times before and it has not been fixed. The water was so bad today that it is splashing the front door and making the carpet at the front of our shop wet. It is a hazard to people walking past especially as it’s a crossing near many schools. Thank you in advance. Have a lovely day!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 232, Hither Green Lane, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rendlesham Road trash lined, 2nd June
item.description:
For several weeks Rendlesham Rd from Brooke Road to the park had not been serviced. There is dog poo, food, trash, food from bins and general waste.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rendlesham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown tree outside 8 and 10 clockhouse, 2nd June
item.description:
Tree is overgrowing and has been like it for months. Starting to obstruct the pathway aswell

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clock House Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road drain is blocked causing rainwater flood, 2nd June
item.description:
Road drain needs unblocking

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 153, Upper Brockley Road, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 30/40cm of water present in road in health rain., 2nd June
item.description:
When it rains a large puddle forms 30/40cm deep. Both dangerous for pedestrians and vehicles having to cross it. Has been getting worse over the years. Today the puddle covered the whole road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crabtree Manorway North, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 2nd June
item.description:
Resident has called to report a van fly tipping items outside of Jackson House. Please can this be looked into and for the fly tip to be collected.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dorset Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: LIVE ENVIRONMENTAL INCIDENT - LimeBike is leaching noxious chemicals into the Thames, 2nd June
item.description:
LIVE ENVIRONMENTAL INCIDENT - please effect an immediate recovery to minimise the leaching of noxious chemicals into our River Thames.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dreadnought Walk, Greenwich Peninsula, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest bike outside number 102 Broad Walk, 2nd June
item.description:
Abandoned. Been here for days and repeatedly it has been pushed over into road - residents of street have to stand it up again.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Broad Walk, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet
